ORDER CONTINUING THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION AND THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. PARTIES SHALL APPEAR CONCERNING THE STATUS OF ORDER OF EXAMINATION AND CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. IF JUDGMENT HAS BEEN PAID, PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, AND THE HEARING WILL GO OFF CALENDAR.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT. ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED. CLAIM OF EXEMPTION DENIED; FUNDS BEING HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER, IF ANY, SHALL BE RETURNED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $50.00 PER MONTH COMMENCING FEBRUARY 1, 2011, AND THEREAFTER ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULLY PAID (NO GRACE PERIOD). IF DEFENDANT DEFAULTS ON ANY PAYMENT, THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT SHALL BECOME DUE IMMEDIATELY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JAN-06-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER (SC-105) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) IS SET FOR A HEARING ON MAR-15-2011 AT 10:00 AM DEPT.506. ALL PARTIES MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD AND ALSO, BRING EVIDENCE TO THE HEARING TO SUPPORT YOUR REQUEST - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.

THE MOTION ON (SC-105A) ORDER RE: TIME PAYMENT ISSUE. OF MAR-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR - AS DEFENDANT DOES NOT WANT TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS INTO THE COURT AS THERE IS A $20.00/PAYMENT FEE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WANT TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS AS HE CLAIMS THE MAIL SERVICE IS NOT RELIABLE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Anatoly Victor Shashurin, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Aaron Lasnover, appears in Pro Per. Appearing with Mr. Shashurin is a witness, Tatiana Harris. Parties, respectively, present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
